name: eggd_cgp-cnvkit-coverage
title: eggd_cgp-cnvkit-coverage
summary: Computes CNVkit on-target read coverage for one tumour-only CGP panel sample (amplicon mode). Output .targetcoverage.cnn feeds eggd_cgp-cnvkit-pon (PoN build) or eggd_cgp-cnvkit-batch (analysis).

inputSpec.name: tumour_bam
inputSpec.label: Tumour BAM
inputSpec.help: Mapped reads for the tumour sample. BAM must be indexed (tumour_bai required). Chr-prefixed chromosome names (chr1, chr2 ...) expected to match the baits BED.

inputSpec.name: sample_id
inputSpec.label: Sample ID
inputSpec.help: Used as the output file stem: <sample_id>.targetcoverage.cnn.

inputSpec.name: baits
inputSpec.label: Gene panel BED
inputSpec.help: Target intervals in BED format. Chr-prefix chromosome names required (chr1, chr2 ...). For the Twist Oncology CGP panel, use the deduplicated BED (20,905 intervals after removing 7 coordinate-duplicate rows).

inputSpec.name: target_avg_size
inputSpec.label: Average on-target bin size (bp)
inputSpec.help: Target bin size in base pairs. Default 250 bp. Must be consistent across coverage, PoN build, and analysis runs.

outputSpec.name: coverage_cnn
outputSpec.label: Target coverage file (.targetcoverage.cnn)
outputSpec.help: Per-interval read depth in CNVkit .cnn format. Pass to eggd_cgp-cnvkit-pon for PoN construction, or to eggd_cgp-cnvkit-batch as pre-computed coverage.
